raw_consumer_statement: I ordered from XXXX in XXXX for {$610.00} and never received the merchandise. The owner stated multiple times that the credit is coming and it has never come. Citibank after XXXX months said I am responsible for the charge. When I contacted Citi they stated the merchant said he delivered the product. Where is the proof. The merchant has numerous reviews stating he is a scammer and does not deliver the order.Merchant owner has continued to lie about inventory, employees not doing their job and refund date
